comments: On the eve of the 1985 Knebworth Fayre headlined by Deep Purple, TV presents the FRS live from the festival site. With special guest Ian Gillan who chats in the studio between tracks and visits the camp site to meet the fans.

track_listing.track: Part 1 starts at beginning of show
SOS (LP - The Pack) Bronze
Miss You Tonight (LP - The Pack) Bronze
Theme For an Imaginary Western (LP - Climbing!) Windfall
She Loves Her Rock (LP - Go For Your Life) Scott Bros
Crazy Daisy's House of Dreams (LP - Mama's Boys) Jive
Needle in the Groove (LP - Power and Passion) Jive
Highway Song (LP - Strikes) ATCO
Morning Dew (LP - Vertical Smiles) ATCO
Lights Out (LP - Lights Out) Chrysalis
Doctor, Doctor (LP - Phenomenon) Chrysalis
You Took The Words Right Out Of My Mouth (Hot Summer Night) (LP - Bat Out Of Hell) Epic
Part 1 cuts above in the middle of the track above
Part 2 starts
Bad Attitude (LP - Bad Attitude) Arista
I'm Gonna Love Her For The Both Of Us (LP - Dead Ringer) Epic
Dark Lady (LP - In Trance) RCA
Make it Real (LP - Animal Magnetism) Harvest
Is There Anybody There? (LP - Lovedrive) Harvest
Black Night (Single) Harvest
Perfect Strangers (LP - Perfect Strangers) Polydor
Woman From Tokyo (LP - Who Do We Thnk We Are) Purple
Smoke on the Water (LP - Machine Head) Purple
Part 2 ends at end of show
